prompt: Which WCAG 2.2 criteria are automatically handled by standard UIKit/SwiftUI controls and which require manual implementation? Give me the top 5 that developers miss most.

assertions.text: Lists at least 3 automatically handled criteria (e.g., 4.1.2, 2.5.2, 2.1.1)
Lists 1.1.1 (Non-text Content) as requiring manual implementation
assertions.rationale: Skill marks this as high-priority AI failure area

assertions.text: Lists criteria that DON'T apply to native iOS apps (e.g., 4.1.1 Parsing, 2.4.1 Bypass Blocks)
assertions.rationale: Skill documents non-applicable criteria; WITHOUT often includes web-only criteria

assertions.text: Identifies at least one WCAG 2.2 NEW criterion (2.5.7, 2.5.8, 3.3.7, or 3.3.8)
assertions.rationale: Skill documents all WCAG 2.2 additions; WITHOUT often uses older WCAG 2.1
